subcodes.first_line: The Book, revealed by the Wronged One, is for him who hath acknowledged and confessed the Manifestation of God, His sovereignty, His glory and His power, that he may take hold of it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقر و اعترف بظهور الله و سلطانه و عزه و اقتداره لیاخذه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
